title: SoFi to launch its stablecoin on Solana, citing speed and cost
message_html: SoFi to launch its stablecoin on Solana, citing speed and cost ...
snippet: SoFiUSD is a fully reserved U.S. dollar stablecoin issued by SoFi Bank, a nationally chartered bank.

title: Kraken partners with MoneyGram for global crypto cash-outs
message_html: Kraken partners with MoneyGram for global crypto cash-outs ...
snippet: The partnership enabling conversion of digital assets into cash through MoneyGram’s global network follows a similar move by rival Western Union.
